_comment: LinkedIn creator feed → /api/intel/ingest. Import this into n8n, then: (1) create Apify credential with your ROTATED key, (2) set the x-ingest-token header to match INTEL_INGEST_TOKEN in Vercel env, (3) set the linkedin_creators key in the Config tab of the Google Sheet, (4) activate the schedule trigger. The workflow reads the creator list from Config each run so you can edit it in the sheet without touching n8n.
name: LinkedIn HQ — creator feed
